data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditable history.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Auditable history without relying on app-only reconstruction'. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or concrete API reads that confirm the existence of an auditable history. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without specific evidence or endpoints to verify it, the validation is inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of auditable history or concrete API reads to validate the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auditable history requirement.
